critiques.finding: Wizard header chrome is a simplified shadcn flex row; IR nests bTHEL/bTHEQ under bTHHM with Bubble Group layout, padding, and style_ref tokens not resolved.
critiques.alternative: Add bTHHM wrapper with data-bubble-id and map header Group styles from ir/slices/styles.json when MOD-DRSAM-DESIGN-SYSTEM lands.

critiques.finding: bTGNJ__workflows____part_A.json lists many ButtonClicked workflows per step; shell correctly implements CustomEvent next_step/previous_step (bTHIT/bTHIw) but does not dispatch actual CustomEvents — navigation is direct React state updates.
critiques.alternative: Acceptable for SPA shell; document that per-step ButtonClicked workflows remain in step components (AUTH-04/05). Optionally emit synthetic events for parity testing.

critiques.finding: Bubble ChangeThing on next_step/previous_step persists onboarding_step_os to CurrentUser; React keeps step in useState only, so mid-flow refresh loses position.
critiques.alternative: Sync step slug to userProfile or session storage in a follow-up item if resume-on-refresh is required.
